sentence_translated: Hello, on the advice of [PERSON], the Prednisolone will be reduced more slowly, i.e. two weeks 10 mg. and then 2 weeks 5 mg. Is it possible to send a prescription to the pharmacy in which this is stated?
Label: Clinical

sentence_translated: Additionally, I'd like to ask, because I forgot to ask [PERSON-1], how is it possible that I constantly have recurring iron deficiencies and require extra iron? Is this due to the medication, nutrition or something else? Because since I got sick, this has already been my fourth bag of supplemental iron.
Label: Clinical

sentence_translated: Yet every time I am told that the blood is in order and then it doesn't turn out okay?????
Label: Clinical

sentence_translated: Hello [PERSON], thank you for your message and for canceling the appointment.

sentence_translated: I'll make a new appointment after the summer before the end of the year.

sentence_translated: I will email again next week but wonder what the content of the white blood cells was and if it was lower than in early November?
